name: HDFC Bank Diners Club Black Metal Edition Credit Card

rewards.displayRate: Up to 10X Reward Points (10 RP / Rs 150 spent via SmartBuy)
Up to 5X Reward Points (5 RP / Rs 150 spent via SmartBuy)
Up to 3X Reward Points (15 RP / Rs 150 spent on instant vouchers via SmartBuy)
10 Reward Points / Rs 150 on weekend dining at standalone restaurants

domestic: Unlimited complimentary airport lounge access worldwide for primary and add-on cardholders.
international: Unlimited complimentary airport lounge access worldwide for primary and add-on cardholders.

specialSpendRules.notes: Grocery spends earn rewards capped at 2,00,000 total cycle cap, but specifically capped at 2,000 Reward Points per calendar month for grocery spends.
Utility spends earn rewards capped at 2,00,000 total cycle cap, but specifically capped at 2,000 Reward Points per calendar month for utility and telecom categories individually.
Insurance spends earn rewards capped at 5,000 Reward Points per calendar month (effective 1 July 2025).
Education payments can earn rewards subject to current HDFC terms

milestones.label: 10,000 bonus reward points per quarter on spends of Rs 4 lakh or more

milestoneBenefits: 10,000 bonus reward points per quarter on spends of Rs 4 lakh or more
Renewal fee waived on spending Rs 8 lakh in 12 months

joiningBenefitsValued.label: Complimentary annual memberships of Club Marriott, Amazon Prime, and Swiggy One upon spending Rs 1.5 Lakh in the first 90 days of card issuance

joiningBenefits: Complimentary annual memberships of Club Marriott, Amazon Prime, and Swiggy One upon spending Rs 1.5 Lakh in the first 90 days of card issuance
additionalBenefits: 6 complimentary golf games per quarter, up to 24 rounds annually
Up to 40% off on dining with Swiggy Dineout
additionalDetails: Reward Points earnings are capped at 75,000 per statement cycle
Reward Points on grocery transactions are capped at 2,000 per calendar month
Reward Points on utility transactions are capped at 2,000 per calendar month
Reward Points on insurance transactions are capped at 5,000 per calendar month (effective 1 July 2025)

transferPartnerValuations.note: 2 reward points → 1 Accor ALL point · Rs 2/point
2 reward points → 1 Club ITC point · Rs 1/point
2 reward points → 1 Marriott point · avg Rs 0.6/point

salaried: Net monthly income greater than Rs 2.5 lakh
selfEmployed: Net income greater than Rs 30 lakh per annum

internalNotes: Card details manually reviewed and verified by user on 2026-05-30
Joining/Renewal fee is Rs 10,000 + taxes, with renewal fee waived on Rs 8 Lakh spends in 12 months.
Reward Points earning is capped at 75,000 per statement cycle.
Reward Points on grocery transactions and utility transactions are capped at 2,000 per calendar month individually.
Reward Points on insurance transactions have a maximum cap of 5,000 Reward Points per calendar month (effective 1 July 2025). Before this, a daily cap of 5,000 RP was applicable.
No reward points are earned on online skill-based gaming transactions and wallet loading (excluding PayZapp) (effective 1 July 2025).

No reward points are earned on education payments made through third-party apps like CRED, Cheq, MobiKwik, etc. (effective 1 September 2024); direct school/college website or POS transactions do earn rewards.
A 1.75% markup fee (effective 15 May 2026) is charged on all transactions carried out in Indian Currency at international locations or with merchants registered overseas (DCC / Overseas Markup).
Unlimited complimentary airport lounge access worldwide for primary and add-on cardholders.
6 complimentary golf games per quarter, up to 24 rounds annually. Golf access requires verification at the course on the day of play.
Credit liability cover up to Rs 9 lakh.
Up to 50 days interest-free credit period.

Point redemption: 1 Reward Point = Rs 1 for hotel/flight bookings on SmartBuy (up to 70% of booking value), 1 Reward Point = up to 1.0 Airmiles, 1 Reward Point = up to Rs 0.50 for Products/Vouchers, and 1 Reward Point = up to Rs 0.30 for statement cashback.
